reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para compartir, sanitarios limpios y con rico olor, bien organizado adentro, lo único malo la chica que atiende lo hace de mala gana con mala cara.. 4 estrellas

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to hang out, clean and smelling restrooms, well organized inside. The only downside is the girl who works there; she's unfriendly and has a bad attitude. 4 stars
